cases.prompt: The code changed; update the user-facing docs to match.
cases.expected_behavior: Synchronizes documentation with the code change.

cases.prompt: Review the latest commit and patch any docs that are now stale.
cases.expected_behavior: Finds documentation drift and updates the docs.

cases.prompt: Write a new feature spec from scratch.
cases.expected_behavior: This is spec writing, not doc sync after code changes.

cases.prompt: The API response shape changed; update the examples and the README.
cases.expected_behavior: Covers docs that need to reflect changed behavior and examples.
